task_description: Build a production-grade AI-powered job marketplace platform for Bangladesh and emerging markets. Full system with Next.js 16 App Router, Supabase backend, deterministic AI matching engine, role-based auth (jobseeker/employer), real application workflow, employer dashboard, and real-time messaging (unlocked only after acceptance).

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds (Next.js 16.2.9 Turbopack, 18 pages, 20 routes). npm run lint passes with no errors. All 5 features implemented and verified. Semantic review v2 APPROVED after fixing 5 critical issues from v1 (broken logout, pagination off-by-one, role escalation, N+1 queries, seed migration docs). 3 non-blocking improvement suggestions remain for future hardening.
